notes: This pack starts the Phase 0.5 invariant-deepening scaffold against the v15.7 coverage contract.
It is contract-facing registry data for named cross-phase invariants and row-local invariant suites.
It does not by itself upgrade any row from partial to full; executable suite enforcement remains future work.

cross_phase_invariants.label: solver truth invariant
assertions: structural truth comes from solver execution, not GPT prose
coverage claims must remain solver-grounded
falsification_conditions: a row is considered covered without solver execution
interpretive prose is allowed to substitute for structural output

cross_phase_invariants.label: one-runtime invariant
assertions: there is only one live canonical runtime
old-runtime comparison helpers do not become live structural truth
falsification_conditions: a second live solver truth is allowed to persist
GUI/runtime truth depends on an older runtime remaining live

cross_phase_invariants.label: structure/process separation
assertions: structural axes and process distinctions remain separate slots
process grammars are not reduced to generic weighted deltas
falsification_conditions: axes are reused as process grammars
process distinctions collapse into generic axis-weight behavior

cross_phase_invariants.label: relation-triad separation
assertions: source, medium, and receiving remain distinct participations
medium is not optional in encounter logic
falsification_conditions: binary shorthand erases medium participation
changing medium leaves relation outcome unchanged when it should not

cross_phase_invariants.label: payload-process separation
assertions: acute and accumulated remain distinct process distinctions
retained and emitted remain distinct process distinctions
falsification_conditions: payload-process distinctions are flattened into one loading shell
retained versus emitted handling no longer changes solver behavior

cross_phase_invariants.label: order separation
assertions: depth order remains distinct from scan/read order
order-sensitive outcomes stay tied to formed order
falsification_conditions: scan order stands in for formed order
order-depth changes stop affecting order-facing outputs

cross_phase_invariants.label: face separation
assertions: inner landing and outer emission remain distinct process positions
face changes can alter solver output
falsification_conditions: inner and outer face flatten into the same relation shell
face becomes decorative metadata only

cross_phase_invariants.label: threshold mirror invariant
assertions: threshold behavior remains mirrored under aligned-prevailing versus maladaptive-prevailing conditions
destructive contraction is not reduced to ordinary rerouting
falsification_conditions: threshold symmetry breaks without explicit solver reason
destructive contraction is treated as ordinary reroute success

cross_phase_invariants.label: family-truth invariant
assertions: alignment, misalignment, and destruction remain whole-family truths
family handling remains relational rather than scalar shorthand
falsification_conditions: family truth is reduced to a single averaged scalar
same-family shorthand erases relational difference

cross_phase_invariants.label: failure-grammar invariant
assertions: overflow, substitution, plastic deformation, suppression, and collapse remain behaviorally distinct
each failure grammar retains distinct trigger pattern and state effect
falsification_conditions: neighboring failure grammars flatten into one blocked-pressure shell
failure labels differ while exposed solver behavior remains the same

cross_phase_invariants.label: Leg persistence invariant
assertions: distributed Leg is not reduced to renamed local signature
trace persistence remains meaningful in solver output
falsification_conditions: distributed persistence collapses into local Leg shorthand
trace/distributed span fields stop affecting Leg-facing behavior

cross_phase_invariants.label: determinism invariant
assertions: the same validated input through the same canonical runtime yields the same structural result
falsification_conditions: identical validated input produces different structural outputs without explicit canonical cause

row_local_suites.label: ARI coherence across maintained axes
minimum_expectations: maintained-axis semantics stay distinct
canonical axis outputs remain coherent under retained handling
falsification_conditions: Cfg/Emb/Org/Dir/Leg flatten into one fungible local shell
canonical local-axis outputs stop tracking maintained-axis profile changes

row_local_suites.label: medium-sensitive encounter logic
minimum_expectations: medium changes can alter relation outcome while source and receiving stay fixed
source, medium, and receiving remain non-collapsed roles
falsification_conditions: medium can be removed without relation consequence
source/medium/receiving reduce to binary shorthand

row_local_suites.label: mirrored threshold behavior
minimum_expectations: threshold behavior mirrors under aligned-prevailing versus maladaptive-prevailing conditions
compensation is not confused with success
falsification_conditions: mirror behavior breaks without explicit solver cause
compensation outcomes are mislabeled as success states

row_local_suites.label: whole-family truth separation
minimum_expectations: aligned, misaligned, and destructive family truths remain distinct
family handling stays relational
falsification_conditions: family truth is reduced to scalar averaging
same-family shorthand erases aligned versus misaligned distinction

row_local_suites.label: overflow grammar separation
minimum_expectations: overflow retains distinct trigger pattern and exposed output
overflow remains distinct from substitution
falsification_conditions: overflow is realized as substitution shorthand
overflow loses its distinct compensation/cascade footprint

row_local_suites.label: substitution grammar separation
minimum_expectations: substitution retains distinct reroute/projection behavior
substitution remains distinct from overflow
falsification_conditions: substitution is realized as overflow shorthand
reroute-specific outputs disappear

row_local_suites.label: maintained-form deformation
minimum_expectations: accumulated retained loading can alter maintained form
plastic deformation remains distinct from collapse
falsification_conditions: maintained form does not change under plastic-loading conditions
plastic deformation is realized as collapse shorthand

row_local_suites.label: suppression grammar separation
minimum_expectations: suppression remains distinct from collapse
blocked-pressure handling retains its own envelope/cascade footprint
falsification_conditions: suppression is just a softer collapse label
suppression loses its distinct blocked grammar footprint

row_local_suites.label: collapse grammar separation
minimum_expectations: collapse retains distinct trigger pattern and exposed output
collapse remains distinct from suppression
falsification_conditions: collapse is realized as generic blocked-pressure shorthand
collapse loses its destinct envelope/cascade projection footprint

row_local_suites.label: inner versus outer face
minimum_expectations: first landing at inner face remains distinct from outer emission
face changes can alter solver consequence
falsification_conditions: inner and outer face flatten into one relation shell
face survives only as decorative metadata

row_local_suites.label: formed-order dependency
minimum_expectations: depth order governs order-facing behavior
order dependence is not reducible to scan/read order
falsification_conditions: scan order substitutes for formed order
order-depth changes stop affecting solver output

row_local_suites.label: distributed persistence
minimum_expectations: distributed persistence remains distinct from local signature
trace persistence and distributed span remain meaningful
falsification_conditions: distributed Leg is reduced to renamed local Leg
trace/distributed persistence fields no longer change solver output

row_local_suites.label: field-regime admissibility
minimum_expectations: field changes live regime-space admissibility and handling
field recursion remains more than commentary
falsification_conditions: field is present only as doctrinal metadata
field-regime changes stop affecting admissibility or solver handling
